shorts.title: The AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos
shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

shorts.title: The Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom
shorts.title_distilled: Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom.
shorts.description: Archbald, Pennsylvania, a borough of fewer than 8,000 people, may soon be home to five massive data centers that, when completed, will rank among the largest in the world. While residents are worried that data centers will strain the electric grid and drive u…

shorts.description: NORTH ABINGTON TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A new dog rescue has stepped into the spotlight with hopes of helping local animal shelters. shorts.title_distilled: Celebrating local filmmakers at NEPA Film Festival.
shorts.description: WAVERLY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A milestone moment for a growing arts scene brought filmmakers and fans together this weekend. The 10th annual NEPA Film Festival wrapped up after a three-day run that began Friday. The event, hosted by the Waverly Community House, brought together local filmmakers, national talent, and international voices. Crowds filled the [...]

shorts.title: Volunteers clean up community in annual cleanup
shorts.title_distilled: Volunteers clean up community in annual cleanup.
shorts.description: ARCHBALD, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a beautiful weather day to clean up the community. More than a dozen volunteers participated in the annual cleanup of Main Street in Archbald. Several organizations, including the NEPA Sierra Club, Queer NEPA, and Valley Community Library, organized the event. All supplies were provided, thanks to Keep NEPA [...]

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Crowds filled the streets, and the energy was high on Sunday in Lackawanna County as runners pushed their limits for the Scranton Half Marathon. shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — A former resource officer accused of raping multiple high school students is set for trial on Monday.
